title: thelypteris moniliformis
intro: Thelypteris moniliformis, also known as the chain fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Thelypteris moniliformis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat gastrointestinal issues. Thelypteris moniliformis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make herbal remedies such as decoctions and infusions.
